name: Jill Vogel
subject: Senator Jill Vogel- Update February 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 332 West Lee Hwy PMB 312 Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Senator Jill H. Vogel Update February 2021
We are into week four of the 2021 Virginia General Assembly session. Due to COVID-19 restrictions, we continue to meet in the Science Museum of Virginia and not the Senate Chamber in the State Capitol. The Senate meets in person every day--we have temperature checks, wear masks, and spread across a ballroom that has been turned into a makeshift legislative office, committee room, and Senate Chamber where we conduct our floor debate and vote. This session comes on the heels of a marathon in the fall when the House and Senate met to address election law changes, COVID-19 funding, and general budget challenges. While we are intended to act as a part-time citizen legislature, we met 150 days last year, with an 84-day special session. We took a small break at the holidays before returning to debate the future of Virginia. The legislature is literally overhauling Virginia, and there are big divisions among us as we move forward. Most of my constituents have two priorities-- open schools and distribute vaccines more efficiently. My goal has been to do everything in my power to improve Virginia's performance in both of those areas. That really should be the only focus now, but the legislature has been consumed by so much more. One element of discipline has made things better. We adopted limits on the number of bills that can be introduced this session. Delegates are limited to seven bills and senators are permitted twelve. In the past, we have done between 2,500 and 3,000 bills and resolutions in a General Assembly session. This year it would be difficult to move that amount of legislation given the health concerns, limits on space, and lack of in-person communication with constituents that is so critical to the legislative process. Despite the limits, we still have nearly 1,300 measures introduced. The most controversial bills debated include marijuana legalization; the death penalty; expungement of criminal records; gaming; conforming Virginia's Constitution to the United States Supreme Court's ruling on marriage; reducing the number of SOLS required in schools; amendments to the 2020-2022 Biennial Budget; conforming Virginia's tax code to the federal code; and protecting PPP loans from higher taxes. The Senate had an important victory in the fight to open schools. A measure that would require public schools to make in-person instruction available to every student passed by a vote of 26 to 13. We also had a legislative victory in the effort to address the terrible vaccine delays and inexplicable barriers to COVID-19 vaccine distribution in Virginia. At least one issue is a lack of health care professionals who are qualified to administer the vaccine. The Senate voted to pass emergency legislation that expands the pool of qualified people, allowing any qualified health care provider in Virginia to volunteer as a vaccinator. The Senate also approved legislation to impose much needed transparency on the Virginia Parole Board. It resulted from investigations by the State Inspector General that came after the Board granted parole to a convicted murderer without following the provisions of law or addressing the matter with the victim's family. It was then revealed that the Parole Board was under investigation for multiple other cases of malfeasance. Worse still, there was an effort to cover up the investigations. All of it was a stain on Virginia's parole system and painful for victims and their families. Finally, a critical tax conformity issue was voted on by the Senate and remains to be negotiated with the House. The federal CARES Act included provisions to prevent businesses from being taxed for receiving Payroll Protection Plan (PPP) funding. It makes sense that Virginia would conform our tax code to do the same, but many objected and want to tax that money in Virginia. I voted to exempt it entirely, but that vote failed, and a compromise passed that includes a tax. We still have weeks to go, so all of these measures will be debated further in the House and hopefully progress will be made. Tonight I will be hosting a COVID-19 town hall with Loudoun legislators and I invite you to join to learn more about Virginia's challenges with the vaccine and what is being done to accelerate the process. To register for the town hall click the following link: [https://zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_9kQTYqHWR2eCqPkFj2NWPg](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_F-z5NfR8fLLMI-CDTPEbId5Nea74R-NQhF8vBbsF6eqmZHSyk-n2NaLQZdNooYqwqOCKfTPOsx_S7fPYE701_GkfpnIA3QXsppU4GgyrhIEy5UModk40IUiC4kUVlEZ9VTEXt5AfMmPDu-7jWKULMChYjvGmuY8AhWyz3hinVVXLQKGoreUDLjunaE8DqjJ&c=nLOwSiq8MTrSRPClsL__8OIGX2P_3D2o_YyAVh-yrqB2BeadCQ1lcQ==&ch=612QVwb4CeFQjJJ-Ub4H5wDWeVkqiKxUiaz9HoHzwgmSKx6aDyZDHA==)
It is an honor to represent you in the Senate and I welcome your feedback. If you have questions or concerns, please contact my Capitol office at ([804) 698-7527](tel:\(804\)%20698-7527) or via email at [district27@senate.virginia.gov](mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov). The Senate has also set up a constituent hotline so that you can call about legislation being considered this session. If you want to make your position known on a bill of importance to you, call the Senate Message Center toll-free at [(833) 617-1821](tel:\(833\)%20617-1821).

---
| Sincerely,
---
| | |
---|---
|

Senator Jill Vogel

| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

This year it would be difficult to move that amount of legislation given the health concerns, limits on space, and lack of in-person communication with constituents that is so critical to the legislative process. Despite the limits, we still have nearly 1,300 measures introduced. The most controversial bills debated include marijuana legalization; the death penalty; expungement of criminal records; gaming; conforming Virginia's Constitution to the United States Supreme Court's ruling on marriage; reducing the number of SOLS required in schools; amendments to the 2020-2022 Biennial Budget; conforming Virginia's tax code to the federal code; and protecting PPP loans from higher taxes. The Senate had an important victory in the fight to open schools. A measure that would require public schools to make in-person instruction available to every student passed by a vote of 26 to 13. We also had a legislative victory in the effort to address the terrible vaccine delays and inexplicable barriers to COVID-19 vaccine distribution in Virginia. At least one issue is a lack of health care professionals who are qualified to administer the vaccine. The Senate voted to pass emergency legislation that expands the pool of qualified people, allowing any qualified health care provider in Virginia to volunteer as a vaccinator. The Senate also approved legislation to impose much needed transparency on the Virginia Parole Board. It resulted from investigations by the State Inspector General that came after the Board granted parole to a convicted murderer without following the provisions of law or addressing the matter with the victim's family. It was then revealed that the Parole Board was under investigation for multiple other cases of malfeasance. Worse still, there was an effort to cover up the investigations. All of it was a stain on Virginia's parole system and painful for victims and their families. Finally, a critical tax conformity issue was voted on by the Senate and remains to be negotiated with the House. The federal CARES Act included provisions to prevent businesses from being taxed for receiving Payroll Protection Plan (PPP) funding. It makes sense that Virginia would conform our tax code to do the same, but many objected and want to tax that money in Virginia. I voted to exempt it entirely, but that vote failed, and a compromise passed that includes a tax. We still have weeks to go, so all of these measures will be debated further in the House and hopefully progress will be made. Tonight I will be hosting a COVID-19 town hall with Loudoun legislators and I invite you to join to learn more about Virginia's challenges with the vaccine and what is being done to accelerate the process. To register for the town hall click the following link: == It is an honor to represent you in the Senate and I welcome your feedback. If you have questions or concerns, please contact my Capitol office at (tel:\(804\%20698-7527) or via email at mailto:district27@senate.virginia.gov. The Senate has also set up a constituent hotline so that you can call about legislation being considered this session. If you want to make your position known on a bill of importance to you, call the Senate Message Center toll-free at tel:\(833\%20617-1821). | Sincerely, | | | ---|--- | Senator Jill Vogel | | | | | ---|--- | Local Health Department Links for Vaccine Information == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Senate 332 West Lee Hwy PMB 312 Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram Updates == == == | | Vogel for Senate | 332 West Lee Hwy, PMB 312, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@senatorjillvogel.com powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: We Need Term Limits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩 | | | |
---
| | | Friends,

During my campaign for Congress, I spoke to many voters across the Second District, and _one of the issues that constantly came up was Term Limits for Congress._

**The people of Kansas are sick of the permanent Washington establishment.** They don't want politicians who only worry about winning reelection. That is why last week, _I co-sponsored a Constitutional Amendment to establish term limits for Members of Congress._

I wrote this op-ed to express why this issue is important to **ensure valuable and constituent-focused service from Members of Congress and Senators**. You can read the article below.

Help us fight to end permanent Washington by [making a contribution today](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dd6c5187fa&e=1050d051da).
---
| Yours in the fight,

Congressman Jake LaTurner
---
|
---
|
# **We need congressional term limits**
_I understand that I was sent to Washington to fulfill my promises and serve the needs of my constituents. In recognition of that, I moved swiftly to co-sponsor a Constitutional Amendment that imposes term limits on all members of Congress._ _Washington, D.C., has increasingly become a place where politicians arrive with the sole objective of permanently staying in power._ _The American people are fed up with this status quo._ _It turns out that when members of Congress spend every waking moment of their term consumed with their own re-election prospects, the concerns of Americans fall by the wayside. As a result, all we are left with is unsolved problems and a $27 trillion national debt (and counting!)_ _It is time for a major reform to the system. Thankfully, the Framers devised a brilliant method to modify our Constitution, granting us the ability to implement term limits through the amendment process._ _In fact, we have already amended our Constitution to impose term limits on the office of the President. The 22nd Amendment imposed a two-term limit on the presidency as a check on executive power in government. The same logic should be applied to Congress._ _The bill I co-sponsored proposes an amendment to the Constitution of the United States to limit the number of terms that a Member of Congress may serve. Members of the U.S. House of Representatives would be limited to three two-year terms of service. Members of the U.S. Senate would be limited to two six-year terms of service._ _Congressional term limits will provide the Legislature with new people who have fresh ideas and are strictly focused on serving the interests of their constituents during their short time in Congress._ _If we are serious about draining the swamp in Washington, term limits should be one of our top priorities._
---
|
---

From passing a new COVID-19 relief bill to strengthening health care to finally closing the gender wage gap, Mark is ready to do what you sent him to Washington to do: _make progress for Virginians_.

So he's interested in hearing what your priorities are for him in 2021. What do _you_ want him to focus on in the 117th Congress?

name: Team Cheney
subject: ALERT: Cheney calls out Biden Administration’s “heart-breaking” policies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Cheney for Wyoming
body:
Liz Cheney offered a blistering critique of the Biden Administration's opening weeks

Friend,
Recently on Fox News, Congresswoman Liz Cheney offered a blistering critique of the Biden Administration's opening weeks. She called for Republicans to unite and stand up to Biden's executive overreach. **Check it out:**

Asking Iowans to foot the bill for New York and California, states who mismanaged their budgets is not common sense and simply unacceptable. [_**Will you support me as I stand up for hardworking taxpayers across the state of Iowa?**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A7YLG15dJ9z5zQpUhBbJ4px0U28bHZwUc3nKssdziaR97mapKgkGMpXZR3z96JSKhGAX_mW9apNhbqKsau09uiWpcZphAMSVME1CWUSvghqumycedhd9szoiwGAkL0xFc59QEz4342gcgCwnobj-Tx6LomvI5pARqpoMdiAhOSrcYolncthBJyGFKZv_qVfE3NU6zqIFvwlz_VqzV0fyEKf4vugdZogTgIa1hqNnAHChcenJ3Q3NLKQ6o9sHskWERRKcQEMrNE6i1juBjQo4VJYDiQLzn3kSBrSZ5qbqH_Epz2tybyUono2gkQqw4vV1Z7ui6eYPAlBzfv9d3sd_iEbwFcyLpWeSQRKhNj3KGOgo2C8mkkq9ccJ8TpAPcN0CtTjdza4U0G-mVHXCCX7Q8heHq-zu4WZl8H78E4nez_5UuksSeNs-jRoXjGOwwTMFo3hwmOjcrNw=&c=pnPiApEm5FJsxeYE8VN0uGtDTQctHGZzdybupe-N9Yruh5Fw4Q4Yjg==&ch=dp0ZT5SvfqQDQqevPg3A-udk1-gOzQTbzS7bJht9rbqymjgsIUC_WQ==) [Yes >>> Stand against the bailouts!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A7YLG15dJ9z5zQpUhBbJ4px0U28bHZwUc3nKssdziaR97mapKgkGMpXZR3z96JSKhGAX_mW9apNhbqKsau09uiWpcZphAMSVME1CWUSvghqumycedhd9szoiwGAkL0xFc59QEz4342gcgCwnobj-Tx6LomvI5pARqpoMdiAhOSrcYolncthBJyGFKZv_qVfE3NU6zqIFvwlz_VqzV0fyEKf4vugdZogTgIa1hqNnAHChcenJ3Q3NLKQ6o9sHskWERRKcQEMrNE6i1juBjQo4VJYDiQLzn3kSBrSZ5qbqH_Epz2tybyUono2gkQqw4vV1Z7ui6eYPAlBzfv9d3sd_iEbwFcyLpWeSQRKhNj3KGOgo2C8mkkq9ccJ8TpAPcN0CtTjdza4U0G-mVHXCCX7Q8heHq-zu4WZl8H78E4nez_5UuksSeNs-jRoXjGOwwTMFo3hwmOjcrNw=&c=pnPiApEm5FJsxeYE8VN0uGtDTQctHGZzdybupe-N9Yruh5Fw4Q4Yjg==&ch=dp0ZT5SvfqQDQqevPg3A-udk1-gOzQTbzS7bJht9rbqymjgsIUC_WQ==) When I served in the Iowa State Legislature, we were careful to make sure we did not exceed our budget. **_New York, California, and Illinois_** _**could learn a thing or two from us here in Iowa!**_ If we allow our hard earned taxpayer money to go towards bailing out these states, they will always expect us to cover their shortfalls, **which is unacceptable**. What should be in this COVID-19 relief package are measures that help all Americans like unemployment benefits for workers across the country who have lost their jobs due to the pandemic -- _not Blue State bailouts_. clean_body: I need your support &zwnj == == Friend, The Democrats are trying to ram a $1.9 trillion COVID-19 relief package through Congress that sets aside $350 billion to bail out Blue States! I went to Washington to represent hard working Iowa taxpayers and bring some Iowa Common Sense back to Washington. Asking Iowans to foot the bill for New York and California, states who mismanaged their budgets is not common sense and simply unacceptable. == == When I served in the Iowa State Legislature, we were careful to make sure we did not exceed our budget. New York, California, and Illinois could learn a thing or two from us here in Iowa! If we allow our hard earned taxpayer money to go towards bailing out these states, they will always expect us to cover their shortfalls, which is unacceptable. What should be in this COVID-19 relief package are measures that help all Americans like unemployment benefits for workers across the country who have lost their jobs due to the pandemic -- not Blue State bailouts. I will always advocate for you in Congress, Friend, but I need your help. == == == == == == == Thank you as always for your support, Congresswoman Ashley Hinson == | PAID FOR BY ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 811, MARION, IA 52302 == | | ASHLEY HINSON FOR CONGRESS | PO BOX 811, Marion, IA 52302 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Roger Misso
subject: An impeachment update from the floor of Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

Here at Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members of integrity for Congress. Today, 5 of our endorsed candidates are on the floor of the US Senate making the case to impeach Donald Trump and defend our democracy against those who incited the terrorist violence of January 6th, 2021.

The most damning evidence presented was played by House impeachment manager Rep. Jamie Raskin - _**[a 13-minute video narrated by Trump 's own words and the despicable actions of the mob that desecrated our Capitol.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/h_qY3SIK3O6MnjvOWSzw8_K9BMo8jXf4GinPnV09xmk=)**_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/HqBShXbUn8VRSuQHXn5J_0qM7DEsp7qblKsXe8wEf5U=)

No matter what happens in this impeachment trial, it is clear: we need more leaders of integrity in Congress. That's why our work is so important - and that's why we need **_you._** We are targeting 8 US Senate seats in 2022 and working to win them right now.[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/HqBShXbUn8VRSuQHXn5J_0qM7DEsp7qblKsXe8wEf5U=)[_**For the next 24 hours, whoever donates at this link will have their donation matched 100% by**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/HqBShXbUn8VRSuQHXn5J_0qM7DEsp7qblKsXe8wEf5U=)[ _** Taking The Hill up to a total matched amount of $5000! Will you help us win the Senate by chipping in today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/HqBShXbUn8VRSuQHXn5J_0qM7DEsp7qblKsXe8wEf5U=)

Thank you for your support. Veterans helped win key U.S. Senate races across America in 2020 - [_**help us do it again in 2022!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/mGPrdp87bI1S9tjmgcFbCqjJZWKARQN-R7gpUbwCWZ4=/HqBShXbUn8VRSuQHXn5J_0qM7DEsp7qblKsXe8wEf5U=)

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso

name: Tim Scott
subject: URGENT: Hold Joe Biden Accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
During the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden frequently offered up a rosy vision of what his first 100 days in office would like. Now, less than a month into his time in office, it's already clear: America cannot afford the Democrat agenda.
Friend,

During the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden frequently offered up a rosy vision of what his first 100 days in office would like. Now, less than a month into his time in office, it's already clear: **America cannot afford the Democrat agenda.**

Joe Biden has already set records on Executive Orders and government overreach. If the Senate GOP does not stand up and demand accountability, Joe Biden and his liberal allies will continue to fundamentally change everything that has made America great.

[**Friend, can you chip in $35 to help the GOP hold Joe Biden accountable for his executive overreach?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hold-joe-biden-accountable-feb/?utm_campaign=20210209_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1047202-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210209_urgent-hold-joe-biden-accountable/)

Biden's wave of Executive Orders has attacked all of the conservative values that we hold dear.

Friend, Joe Biden preached unity and has delivered nothing but pure partisanship.[**Will you chip in anything you can to help hold Joe Biden accountable?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/hold-joe-biden-accountable-feb/?utm_campaign=20210209_TY.100609_tim-scott_t1047202-1260&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210209_urgent-hold-joe-biden-accountable/)

Thank you,

Tim Scott

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011oFlN84XSCaLjeJGD6VO_zf8lD1DZUCjm-t6VWV17gL-R4Q2_G7rNnruW0zacEnMLaYRgv6tYKsgSli_ekxOp5PPOLyROGtuRQwPzktnTUuo69prZKL7AdciOms7PBKxlW96PI1dfHg=&c=rNycY6vpC4_VM-J8FVRurwGiYDstGvDyB4cD3HMMUixGA1-61Y-WQA==&ch=ziIruPkfvqCCq9I3up4uw8L0zS8wj8XrsTN2jC4oF5X6OvUEH8XGBg==).

While Democrats now have the Majority in the House of Representatives, I'm confident that with your help we can win it back so Nancy Pelosi is no longer in charge but instead conservatives lead Congress in helping the American people. == Thank you for your time, Karl Rove *****Confidential Memo*** Attn: House GOP Conservatives Re: Democrats Controlling Congress With control over both houses of Congress, Democrats are figuring out ways to exercise their newly acquired power by pushing through bills that harm Americans and satisfy their Radical Left base. In the House of Representatives however, the Democrats hold a very narrow lead, as Republicans are only 5 seats away from retaking a Conservative Majority. This has led the Radical-Left to begin aggressively campaigning NOW to keep their majority. We aren 't taking this news lightly. Friend, this is important. So, I'll make this quick:

**The Democrats are terrified.** Their Majority is the slimmest it's been in decades and they know we have the momentum to win.

**They 're already organizing against us. **Just weeks after being sworn in, the DCCC is spending hundreds of thousands dollars on an ad against me and other top-targeted Republicans. Because they know, just as well as we do, this seat is 100% critical to winning the House Majority.

**Pelosi 's candidate is back for a rematch.** The Democrats spent $11M+ against us, outspending us 3:1, and spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation.

**The House Majority hinges on this seat, Friend. **The stakes are higher than ever. Can you chip in right now to defend this seat and win back the House Majority for Republicans?

I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill. Friend, it was then I realized the Left's socialist agenda wasn't making things better -- it was actually making it worse.

It's no secret that this seat will remain a top-target, and, Friend, we're going to need every single member of our grassroots team to step up to the plate. To make it clear, here's what's at stake: skyrocketing taxes, a soaring cost of living, thousands more jobs destroyed, regulating small businesses into failure...

[**So, Friend, I have to ask, can I count on you to chip in to save this seat and win the House Majority for Republicans?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001m2TxUt2BXnSsxxUR23O6EKiSHfmV69PZZ86pzJ5jQCISH_Kn4Uk8Y4U2wtnuArWK1ttH6VXiBZqDIbZNlQLHsEMJ892i9Ilt3mBKA15OHIpUXGYwECIlt8Si8WQeU4j4sAVmxL5CRDk-vHX11aecjfb8G3nH64H3mBHy3F0yUoRt2R4Y9Bqksl6jmkkvRcEqswpmi6XioSMioiN2nbInefGYjDNQnPgAtgW2c1W2HpNqpMHnIALQWAG_aCaPPcZXpTlf7SM7Xco9LyYG7umrBZV6hRS9yC1Nac7642tEaSYQ-Mc3fhhU6QcWMK6iZlUJztj-C8PENnH08-ue22P_BLFzhJ0zxHzExBQSuasrJBIPEN11hnWjMc6FR-I8HZFb7k_KDWY-nTJFWCSkPmLUYQ==&c=vqr8wEJrOAm1maW06H6E0fF76CvdPl6J6YWq94mWz_uphB-pPjaF2Q==&ch=Gc8Nfke1o_LUNiEw5ya90AXbIUDHa9bzjtTqJ8JQRVN-T55QDBpTJQ==)

clean_body: %%First Name%%, this is important. So, I'll make this quick: ** . == Friend, this is important. So, I'll make this quick: The Democrats are terrified. Their Majority is the slimmest it's been in decades and they know we have the momentum to win. They 're already organizing against us. Just weeks after being sworn in, the DCCC is spending hundreds of thousands dollars on an ad against me and other top-targeted Republicans. Because they know, just as well as we do, this seat is 100% critical to winning the House Majority. Pelosi 's candidate is back for a rematch. The Democrats spent $11M+ against us, outspending us 3:1, and spent more dark money against us than any other race in the nation. The House Majority hinges on this seat, Friend. The stakes are higher than ever. Can you chip in right now to defend this seat and win back the House Majority for Republicans? | | == | | == | == | | == | == | | == ** I came to America as a young woman with my single-mother, searching for opportunity. Instead, I watched my mother be harassed by a government agency and her small-business fall victim to an unwarranted tax bill. Friend, it was then I realized the Left's socialist agenda wasn't making things better -- it was actually making it worse. It's no secret that this seat will remain a top-target, and, Friend, we're going to need every single member of our grassroots team to step up to the plate. To make it clear, here's what's at stake: skyrocketing taxes, a soaring cost of living, thousands more jobs destroyed, regulating small businesses into failure... == Thank you, Michelle Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. subject: Can we get your input?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTeqUuSC9WmtIAjxedfxKki3ptYyA8cZUaqy4vQqU9c=/pGrALrVx2AaaV6hg7nXEF7oFBtR23h-Blr7bj-ZO4AM=?refcode=BLU-SWC-2021SwapWelcome-2&amount=25)
---
| Hi Peter,

Thank you for joining the team.

In Congress, Susan always takes into consideration what is best for the people of her district and for all Americans.

She doesn't take corporate PAC money, which means they aren't influencing her decisions. Instead, she makes sure she gets input from her constituents and supporters.

_**[Do you have a few minutes today to take our quick survey and tell Susan where you stand on key issues?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTeqUuSC9WmtIAjxedfxKki3ptYyA8cZUaqy4vQqU9c=/x4ZmNIwD7QOk0KyXIHBPW-iGzMtrr9wCkynQG-byVJQ=)**_

Every day, Susan is working to create quality jobs in our state, defend Social Security and Medicare, protect our environment, and reform our broken campaign finance system.

PA-07 played a major role in taking back the House in 2018 and keeping it blue in 2020, but our work is just beginning, and we'll need your help to keep Susan fighting for us.

As a member of the team, your input is incredibly valuable. Will you take our short issues survey to make sure your thoughts and concerns are heard?

Here's the link: _**[https://action.wildforcongress.com/survey/teamwild-welcome1](https://act.myngp.com/el/LTeqUuSC9WmtIAjxedfxKki3ptYyA8cZUaqy4vQqU9c=/x4ZmNIwD7QOk0KyXIHBPW-iGzMtrr9wCkynQG-byVJQ=)**_

Thanks for being on board,
_Team Wild_

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Impeachment Scam - Here we go again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
Instead of working for the people, Democrats are moving forward with an unconstitutional impeachment trial of Donald Trump, even though [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=9dea18300d6f41b99bd2b61cc61963f5&_e=gv_BPWuWC3V3uq1LBVek92Qc6abOIrr_Ii7Q_Oau_bbTZ4DM7nv6x0fOTy6TGErK1KUBp5gFig7xcDSJA-yKYLFAcJEwKT2qeNJq3FtmCfxmoQmrTGsmKWFDAscaEKUzdc860N7UO--6qJVfPJV6_SSMjd4j179SxDHqNxsI-UHq_RAdvyE6q0Gz7xsJ6xRoeck62vvhgIffKHKgr4-9gl69Cj-BOW2Q6add9mSTpJex5uq5wUPeG8gmdMHhY5XtUdqaeo4MiAM0_g3be18cB_Ie7yvWzmycn4uGDV_-XIhNfWu0fIyzMbAJKC8g_B8x3rbBX0Y0jnadaSWxeMTpJFcB8j1mJah-LfUT3jmZ4qk%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Instead of working for the people, Democrats are moving forward with an unconstitutional impeachment trial of Donald Trump, even though he is now a private citizen. It’s truly incredible how quickly the Democrats' promises of unity and bipartisanship have been abandoned.

If the Biden Administration really cared about unity, Joe would tell Senate Democrats to put an end to impeachment. **But Democrats want to divide our country further — _it's that simple._**

_**We should be working for the American people, creating jobs and opening schools.**_

Today, I’m asking you to join my team in telling Democrats in Congress enough is enough! It’s time to put an end to this ridiculous political theatre and get to work.
[**Tell Democrats: Enough theatre -_GET BACK TO WORK!_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=9dea18300d6f41b99bd2b61cc61963f5&_e=gv_BPWuWC3V3uq1LBVek95ZUh1Q5TemZA8kuWaC3rpfwaXI-eWBkMk3f2FJiW1egOKwHSZ0x6KXaiYpghrYt_AQBVqZ5vWqxjo4RTaVhGCkmSCVwQ_KpRBzx-Dbp-waq1iC2JtLO_2qYGhyIMpjXfH_m7qqVcMs1CZraWkYE5s_xq6VD-1zCPeVgON966fMb5tsnzKvNPYn02LkVEn68DiwbO3rBZroPUUO2AvjrQAPgSd_5q2o7teTCk35kHIiQfIHc3Cys7VbKs5CO-SwJzZ31SpP4TaUYS_5PVa2MpEVvFEp6XT-HLb4y-fPFo1O6ig4uWUC4fcSZ2XlF5sMnd9ScOJP4xV7_W8qIMBowcagn4YNU4rVmGJW7dGiDW3tmNEPstVkDfVPqrJY5ECMfmF_G6dg-K_ltyCqGuvKBBvY%3D)
The hysteria in Washington over Donald Trump is getting out of hand. Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Washington establishment are acting out of pure vengeance — _**They wanted to impeach Donald Trump before he took office, and they failed.**_

**We need to put the American people and their interests _FIRST_.** Please consider a donation today to show the Democrats you've had enough!
[**DONATE HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=9dea18300d6f41b99bd2b61cc61963f5&_e=gv_BPWuWC3V3uq1LBVek95ZUh1Q5TemZA8kuWaC3rpfwaXI-eWBkMk3f2FJiW1egOKwHSZ0x6KXaiYpghrYt_AQBVqZ5vWqxjo4RTaVhGCkmSCVwQ_KpRBzx-Dbp-waq1iC2JtLO_2qYGhyIMpjXfH_m7qqVcMs1CZraWkYE5s_xq6VD-1zCPeVgON966fMb5tsnzKvNPYn02LkVEn68DvoxtBXdefFSJHYJJlawMr8t0sBvwJfzzhd0rKlcvPMxni9PZfHcLgwJ5FGQrTuc4UrZrGFuO2IoKxqTGWKCoaqNBcxMxRo_1GaNH7xOLC6mk7OgSgDzLQVU8gYZWN4Xf8bZPPVRTdkBDMikMshIKSTXtbd-hQD_Nz1SSbnC1E9eo1aALStDGVLH0dfdnZvijbL9jGAP8-1LPawWukwbbU0%3D)
**Now, more than ever, we need to put our foot down and stand up for our country and its values.**

I can’t thank American patriots like you enough for your continued support. I hope you keep fighting with me — _**Our nation’s future depends on it. **_

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: Instead of working for the people, Democrats are moving forward with an unconstitutional impeachment trial of Donald Trump, even though | | Peter, Instead of working for the people, Democrats are moving forward with an unconstitutional impeachment trial of Donald Trump, even though he is now a private citizen. It’s truly incredible how quickly the Democrats' promises of unity and bipartisanship have been abandoned. If the Biden Administration really cared about unity, Joe would tell Senate Democrats to put an end to impeachment. But Democrats want to divide our country further — it's that simple. We should be working for the American people, creating jobs and opening schools. Today, I’m asking you to join my team in telling Democrats in Congress enough is enough! It’s time to put an end to this ridiculous political theatre and get to work. The hysteria in Washington over Donald Trump is getting out of hand. Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and the rest of the Washington establishment are acting out of pure vengeance — They wanted to impeach Donald Trump before he took office, and they failed. We need to put the American people and their interests FIRST. Please consider a donation today to show the Democrats you've had enough! Now, more than ever, we need to put our foot down and stand up for our country and its values. I can’t thank American patriots like you enough for your continued support. I hope you keep fighting with me — Our nation’s future depends on it. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
